title: lesser and pavey LP53010 Little Stars Compartment Tray | Christmas design | 1 Pc, Red
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: 1 Compartment Tray with Christmas design 33x23 cm - 230 g
CHRISTMAS DESIGN: This cute and seasonal tray features 4 compartments that are decorated with joyful illustrations of Christmas that children will enjoy.
PERFECT GIFT FOR THE HOLIDAYS: Serve your children's favorite dishes with this lovely compartment tray that is perfect for picnics and parties during the holidays.
HIGH QUALITY: This compartment tray's cute and decorative design is printed on high-quality melamine which is safe to use and easy to clean.
RESISTANT: This compartment tray is made from non-toxic melamine which is durable and a safer alternative to porcelain.
description: Make your children's Christmas memorable with this merry and decorative compartment tray. Perfect gift for the holidays.
